'''Barleos''' was a minor [[Lord/Legends|Lord]] of [[House Melantha]], a [[Saber rake/Legends|saber rake]] and protégé of Lord [[Vaskel Savill]].

==Biography==
A vain man he was said to be good looking but with an effeminate appearance and had numerous lady admirers. Barleos was emotionally unstable, hot-headed and easily insulted into a duel. The fact that he was a talented warrior meant that such a challenge could be deadly. Barleos was a member of [[Vaskel Savill]] conspirators and was involved in a plot to assassinate [[High Lord]] [[Bal Jaset]].<ref name="LOTE" />

{{Char-stub}}
